name: HWR_XP_RESULT_B
description: This is the table for the experience store results.

columns.Name: RESULT_ID
columns.Comments: The Unique database identifier for this result.

columns.Name: IS_SUCCESS
columns.Comments: Indicates whether or not the attempt on the Activity was successful.

columns.Name: IS_COMPLETION
columns.Comments: Indicates whether or not the Activity was completed.

columns.Name: RESPONSE
columns.Comments: A response appropriately formatted for the given Activity.

columns.Name: DURATION
columns.Comments: Period of time over which the Statement occurred. The expected format should be ISO 8601.

columns.Name: SCORE_SCALED
columns.Comments: The score related to the experience as modified by scaling and/or normalization.

columns.Name: SCORE_MIN
columns.Comments: The lowest possible score for the experience described by the Statement.

columns.Name: SCORE_MAX
columns.Comments: The highest possible score for the experience described by the Statement.

columns.Name: SCORE_RAW
columns.Comments: The score achieved by the Actor in the experience described by the Statement.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
